reasoning: Cluster 1 (Infrastructure/Oracle/L2) shows conflicting signals: strong 30-day return (+8.27%, Sharpe 0.82) but sharp near-term reversal with 14-day return of -14.68% and weakening 7-day momentum (-0.68%). The severe 14-day drawdown (-14.68%) and max drawdown of -17.7% suggest persistent selling pressure in the short window most relevant to our 14-day forecast horizon. Annualizing the recent 14-day trend (~-14.68% over 14 days → ~-382% annualized) is too extreme to be sustainable, so we moderate significantly toward mean-reversion expectations, but still lean negative given momentum. Low confidence reflects high annualized volatility (85.1%) and contradictory short vs. medium-term signals.
